title: One system for retrieval, study, and insight.
subtitle: Each layer has a clear purpose, so the page reads like a product with structure instead of a stack of disconnected animated boxes.

lanes.title: See the whole document before you read every page.
lanes.description: High-signal overviews pull out key themes, action items, and terms so you can orient in seconds.
points: Executive recap that exposes the thesis before you dig into details.
Concept highlights that surface terms, patterns, and decision points fast.
Readable output that still works cleanly on mobile and smaller screens.

lanes.title: Ask questions and get answers grounded in your files.
lanes.description: Chat with one document or across a collection, then jump from answer to source material with clear context.
points: Context-aware chat that stays anchored to the documents you actually uploaded.
Cited responses that let you verify where the answer came from immediately.
Cross-document reasoning when multiple files need to be understood together.

lanes.title: Turn disconnected paragraphs into a connected system.
lanes.description: Visual relationships reveal clusters, repeated themes, and hidden dependencies that normal reading misses.
points: Topic mapping that makes dense material easier to scan at a glance.
Relationship discovery that exposes how concepts and claims connect.
Faster visual orientation before you commit to deep reading or review.
